comment: Static service dependency graph for the M2 solver gate (DESIGN §7: hotelReservation is deployed and solver-gated at M2 before any measured summary.json exists for it). Consumed via chaosprobe.placement.fraction_solver.load_static_topology, which assigns uniform edge weight 1.0; measured route-view weights replace this graph once a hotel-reservation run exists.

evidence: hotelReservation/config.json — datastore service addresses (mongodb-*, memcached-profile/rate, memcached-reserve)
notes: frontend also initializes review/attractions gRPC clients at this commit, but those services are not part of the upstream kubernetes/ deployment and no load endpoint exercises them; they are omitted here, as upstream omits them.

consul (registry) and jaeger (tracing) receive control-plane/observability traffic from every app service; those star edges are deliberately excluded from the request-path dependency graph, but both deployments are listed in services so the solver can place them.
Edges are directed [caller, callee]; with 16 uniform-weight edges the fraction quantum is 1/16 = 0.0625, so the f targets {0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1} are exact multiples (4/16, 8/16, 12/16).
